params.positive_prompt: {{ style.prompts.global_base }}, {{ style.prompts.refine_base }}, preserve the anchor fragment: redacted memo dossier clipped into a desk-top evidence plate, preserve the layered support fragments: black redaction bars, clipped annotation flags, underlined sentence band, paper fibers, torn paper, ripped seams, schematic overlay, circuit traces, halftone, photocopy grain, distressed paper texture, accent palette {{ params.accent_palette }}, keep the memo header band blank for later controlled text, keep the marked sentence band blank for later controlled text, keep memo copy obscured into non-readable material
params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no typed paragraphs, no signatures, no handwriting, no dates, no memo copy, no visible paper copy
